case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BRAYAN ALEXANDER MORALES CATALAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CATALAN, BRAYAN ALEXANDER MORALES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRAYAN ALEXANDER MORALES CATALAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $703.16 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CATALAN, BRAYAN ALEXANDER MORALES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATALAN, BRAYAN ALEXANDER MORALES $1,724.12 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,824.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
